summary: Partially completed the ADR 0113 live replay from the latest origin/main tree by repairing the first-refresh world-state materializer path, resyncing the Windmill runtime checkout, granting world_state privileges to the managed Windmill support role, and verifying seven of the nine world-state surfaces live on docker-runtime-lv3 and postgres-lv3.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_world_state_workers.py tests/test_world_state_repo_surfaces.py tests/unit/test_world_state_materializer.py -q` passed with 12 tests, and `python3 -m compileall config/windmill/scripts/world-state platform/world_state` completed successfully.

verification.check: Windmill runtime recovery and repo sync
verification.observed: After the shared `converge-windmill` replay was blocked by an unrelated OpenBao agent template collision, the runtime checkout and ADR 0113 worker files were synced manually onto `/srv/proxmox_florin_server`, and `windmill_server`, `windmill_worker`, `windmill_worker_native`, and `windmill_extra` were started cleanly on `docker-runtime-lv3`.
On `postgres-lv3`, `windmill_user` was granted `USAGE` on schema `world_state` plus table and sequence privileges there, which unblocked inserts from the worker DSN used by ADR 0113.
The first live refresh populated `world_state.current_view`, and `SELECT ispopulated FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname='world_state' AND matviewname='current_view'` returned `t` afterward.

Direct worker execution on `docker-runtime-lv3` succeeded for `proxmox_vms` (7 records), `container_inventory` (58), `netbox_topology` (0), `dns_records` (25), `tls_cert_expiry` (23), `opentofu_drift` (0), and `openbao_secret_expiry` (47).

`world_state.current_view` held seven fresh rows for `container_inventory`, `dns_records`, `netbox_topology`, `openbao_secret_expiry`, `opentofu_drift`, `proxmox_vms`, and `tls_cert_expiry` immediately after the replay.
A direct `refresh-service-health.py` run was still in progress / timing out during the replay window, so the surface was not fully verified in Postgres before this receipt was recorded.

`refresh-maintenance-windows.py` still depends on the controller-coupled SSH tunnel path in `scripts/maintenance_window_tool.py`, so the worker runtime could not verify the surface without additional runtime-specific NATS path work.

notes: The shared `make converge-windmill` replay updated the Windmill runtime files but failed before full completion because another concurrent workstream had replaced the managed Windmill OpenBao template with a test-runner-specific variant. The manual live recovery in this receipt is limited to ADR 0113 runtime checkout sync, schema grants, and container startup needed to verify the world-state surfaces.

The broader `make validate` run again reached the repo-wide `ansible-lint` phase and was interrupted after the focused ADR 0113 checks had already passed; that broad validation path still contains unrelated repo debt outside this ADR.

Merge-to-main still needs the shared Windmill runtime template reconciliation plus final live verification for `service_health` and `maintenance_windows` before ADR 0113 can claim a fully live platform-version implementation.
